channel.title: Tech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ComfyUI Reaches $500 Million Valuation After $30 Million Fundraise
item.description: ComfyUI, which provides tools giving creators greater control over AI-generated image, video, and audio output, has raised $30 million at a $500 million valuation.

item.title: Mac Mini Shortage Drives Premium Resale Listings on eBay
item.description: Apple's sold-out Mac mini is generating marked-up resale listings as demand rises, fueled in part by its growing use for running local AI models.

item.title: Exclusive Dating App Raya Has Left Many Applicants Waiting Years to Join
item.description: The exclusive social and dating app Raya has become increasingly difficult to access, with some prospective members reporting multi-year waits on the application list.

item.title: X Releases Standalone XChat Messaging App for iOS
item.description: X's new standalone messaging application for iOS offers private chats, disappearing messages, and audio and video calling features.

item.title: Google Plans Investment of Up to $40 Billion in AI Company Anthropic
item.description: Google is planning an investment of up to $40 billion in Anthropic, combining cash and computing resources as competition among AI developers intensifies.
